query:
SELECT id, liverId, livestreamDate, livestreamEndTime, duration,
       TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, livestreamDate, livestreamEndTime) as calculated_duration_minutes
FROM brand_livestreams 
WHERE livestreamDate >= '2026-01-01' AND livestreamDate < '2026-02-01'
  AND livestreamEndTime IS NOT NULL
  AND livestreamEndTime < livestreamDate
command:

       TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, livestreamDate, livestreamEndTime) as calculated_duration_minutes
FROM brand_livestreams 
WHERE livestreamDate >= '2026-01-01' AND livestreamDate < '2026-02-01'
  AND livestreamEndTime IS NOT NULL
  AND livestreamEndTime < livestreamDate
